item.tutm.debug: すごいデバッグの四角形の何か
item.tutm.infinite_time_clock: The long hand of time, The short hand of space
item.tutm.time_sand_dust.desc: A tiny grain of sand, imbued with time, is still on the verge of falling into the abyss.
item.tutm.time_sand.desc: Sand that has absorbed even more time—and yet it is still only a fraction of a greater power.
item.tutm.infinite_time_clock.desc: A great power imbued with one of the abilities wielded by The Ultimate Time Manager.
